arts.ttl: (WATCH) Raphinha slots Barcelona ahead at Celta Vigo
arts.sum: Barcelona have secured a perfect return to La Liga action away at Celta Vigo. La Blaugrana are back on track in league action following the international window, with a four point lead at the top of the table ahead of kick off, and that is expected to be stretched on in Galicia. arts.ttl: Flick explains why Balde benched for Barca vs Celta
arts.sum: Yesterday was the first time he trained with the team and that’s why I’ve opted for Gerard,” he said. Barcelona manager Hansi Flick explained why Alejandro Balde was only on the bench for Saturday’s La Liga clash with Celta Vigo .

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Lamine Yamal playing for Barcelona against Celta Vigo in LaLiga?
arts.sum: There was mixed news on the injury front for Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick as he picked his starting lineup for Saturday’s LaLiga game away to Celta Vigo . Although Robert Lewandowki has recovered from a fitness issue in time to start, fellow attacker Lamine Yamal, arguably the team’s most impressive player this season, isn’t part of the matchday squad.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Transfer News: La Liga giants STUNNED by striker's contract demands
arts.sum: Having brought in the likes of Ilkay Gundogan, Inigo Martinez and Andreas Christensen on free transfers in recent years, Barca were hoping to repeat that trick with the signing of Jonathan David . It is claimed that David would cost the club a total of €80 million over a four-year deal – a figure described as ‘not unreasonable’ but currently too high for a player who would not be an undisputed starter.
